new_classes.definition_en: Sparkling fermented beverages of heading 2206 (e.g. cider, perry, mead, saké and other fermented beverages or mixtures thereof with non-alcoholic beverages), classified as sparkling pursuant to Additional Note 10 to Chapter 22 (i.e. having an excess CO₂ pressure of ≥ 3 bar at 20 °C or presenting with a mushroom stopper held by ties or fastenings), in containers of any size.

coverage_explanation: The legal notes for 22060031 establish two key discriminating criteria: (1) the product must be **sparkling** as defined by Additional Note 10 to Chapter 22 (excess CO₂ pressure ≥ 3 bar at 20 °C, or presenting with a mushroom stopper held by ties/fastenings), and (2) it must fall within heading 2206 (other fermented beverages, not wine/vermouth/beer/spirits/cider per se as a named type). The class is modelled as a subclass of FermentedBeverage2206 bearing a SparklingWineQuality, which captures the carbonation/sparkling criterion. The mushroom stopper criterion is referenced via the existing MushroomStopperBottleQuality class in the TBox but the legal note explicitly defers to Additional Note 10 and the explanatory note to 2204 21 06–09 for the full definition of "sparkling" — these cross-references cannot be fully formalised without the content of Additional Note 10 and those explanatory notes. The container-size split between 22060031 (≤ 2 L) and 22060039 (> 2 L) is the primary structural discriminator between the two sibling codes, but the legal text provided covers both together; the SmallContainer restriction encodes the ≤ 2 L criterion for 22060031 specifically. The complement restriction on MixtureOfFermentedBeveragesQuality was added speculatively and is removed in the final call since the legal note does not explicitly exclude mixtures — this is removed to avoid over-restriction. Overall coverage is partial because: (a) the precise pressure threshold (≥ 3 bar) from Additional Note 10 is referenced but not re-stated in this note; (b) the mushroom stopper definition is deferred to 2204 21 06–09 explanatory notes which are not provided here.
